common.tagline: Real estate certification academy in DRC

profile.title: My profile
profile.subtitle: Your name and photo appear on issued certificates.
profile.photoHint: JPG, PNG or WebP — max 2 MB. Shown on your certificates.
profile.certificateNote: This name will appear on your certificates.

home.heroTitle: The reference for real estate certification in DRC
home.heroSubtitle: PROIMMO Academy validates professional competence through a structured certification program — from fundamentals to executive leadership in real estate.
home.programSubtitle: A progressive certification framework designed for agents, managers, and real estate leaders operating in the Democratic Republic of Congo.
home.pathSubtitle: Each certification validates a distinct stage of professional maturity in the real estate sector.
home.featuredSubtitle: Official credentials recognized by employers, agencies, and institutional partners.
home.step1Desc: Follow the recommended learning path aligned with your target certification level.
home.step2Desc: Demonstrate mastery through a proctored assessment with category-based scoring.
home.step3Desc: Earn a digital certificate with a unique verification code and QR seal.
home.step4Desc: Employers and partners can instantly confirm authenticity online.
home.trustDesc: Every PROIMMO certificate is issued with a unique code, verification seal, and validity period — built for professional credibility.

courses.title: Course catalog
courses.subtitle: Programs designed for real estate professionals
courses.noCourses: No courses available at this time.

certifications.title: Real estate certification program
certifications.subtitle: Official PROIMMO certifications to validate expertise across every stage of a real estate career in DRC.
certifications.advantageDesc: Our program combines structured preparation, rigorous official exams, and verifiable digital credentials — aligned with the needs of agencies, banks, and institutional partners.
certifications.statTrust: of employers verify credentials before hiring
certifications.levelsDesc: Browse all available certifications, their target level, and the requirements to earn each credential.
certifications.passOfficialExam: Complete the {program} preparation program and pass the official exam with a minimum score of {score}%.
certifications.prerequisitePro: Hold the Professional certification and demonstrate advanced specialization competencies.
certifications.programInDevelopment: Preparation program launching soon — register to be notified.
certifications.prepOnlineDesc: Access structured learning modules and practice exams through your learner dashboard before attempting the official certification exam.
certifications.prepExamDesc: Timed, scored assessments with category requirements. Successful candidates receive a verifiable digital certificate.
certifications.prepOrgDesc: Agencies and institutions can certify teams through organizational enrollment and seat management.
certifications.resourceVerifyDesc: Instantly confirm the authenticity of any PROIMMO certificate using its unique code.
certifications.resourceDashboardDesc: Track exam attempts, earned certificates, and certification status.
certifications.resourceContactDesc: Organizations can deploy certification programs for their teams.
